sections.paragraph:
Original: חרשׁת

Transliteration: chărôsheth

Phonetic: khar-o'-sheth

BDB Definition:

Harosheth = "woodland"
  1. a city in the north of the land of Canaan on the west coast of the lake Merom

Origin: the same as H2799

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
